.env.SAMPLE.general_idea: Add a placeholder for the Chromatic project token to the environment sample file.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to support Java 21.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 runtime features and the old JDK 11 image is incompatible with the target JDK version.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package manager (apt-get) with Alpine package manager (apk) for installing system dependencies.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not support apt-get; using apt-get would fail at build time.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install bash explicitly as it is not included by default in the minimal Alpine image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Subsequent commands rely on bash, which is missing in the default Alpine environment.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install Maven explicitly since the new base image does not include it.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build process requires Maven to compile the project, and it is no longer provided by the base image.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Install libstdc++ to satisfy native library dependencies required by the application or tools.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Missing C++ standard library headers/libraries can cause runtime linkage errors for native components.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace NodeSource setup script with NVM to manage Node.js installation on Alpine.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous NodeSource setup script was for Debian/Ubuntu and Node 12; NVM provides a more robust way to install specific Node versions on Alpine.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Remove Heroku CLI installation as it is no longer needed or supported in this build context.
Update Node.js version from 12 to 16.20.0 to ensure compatibility with modern frontend tooling.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Node 12 is end-of-life and may not support dependencies required by the frontend build.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Maven build step to compile the application during the Docker image build.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous image likely expected the jar to be pre-built or mounted; the new workflow builds it inside the container.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Change the container entrypoint to run the compiled JAR file instead of starting a bash shell.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The container needs to execute the application, not just provide a shell environment.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Copy application source and configuration files into the Docker image.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The build step requires the source code and pom.xml to be present in the container.
Dockerfile.after:
COPY src /home/app/src
COPY frontend /home/app/frontend
COPY lombok.config /home/app
COPY pom.xml /home/app

dev_environment.general_idea: Rename the Docker image variable to reflect the new project name.

frontend/.storybook/main.js.general_idea: Migrate Storybook configuration from CommonJS (module.exports) to ES Modules (export default) to align with modern frontend tooling standards.
Update Storybook stories glob patterns to include .mdx and .mjs files and remove the deprecated .stories.mdx specific pattern.
Add the explicit framework configuration for react-webpack5, which is required in newer Storybook versions.
Add staticDirs configuration to serve static assets from the public directory.
Add new Storybook addons for onboarding, Chromatic integration, and interactions.
Remove custom webpack plugin that failed builds on warnings, likely due to deprecation or change in build strategy.
frontend/.storybook/main.js.before: const WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning = require("./webpack-plugin-fail-build-on-warning"); ... webpackFinal: async (config) => { config.plugins.push(new WebpackPluginFailBuildOnWarning()); return config; }

frontend/.storybook/preview.js.general_idea: Add import for react-toastify CSS to support toast notifications in Storybook.
Add imports for msw-storybook-addon to enable Mock Service Worker in Storybook.
Add import for ToastContainer component from react-toastify.
Add logic to determine the correct URL for the Mock Service Worker script based on the environment.
Initialize the Mock Service Worker with the determined URL.
Wrap Story content with ToastContainer to render toast notifications.
Refactor Storybook preview configuration to use the modern default export object syntax.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; upgrading is required to compile and run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Maven compiler plugin uses this property; leaving it at 17 prevents compilation on JDK 21 or enforces outdated bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE namespace changes); the application will fail to start or compile without a replacement API documentation library.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC to version 4.1.3 compatible with Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2021.x (compatible with Boot 2.6) is incompatible with Spring Boot 3.3; dependency resolution or runtime class conflicts will occur.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add javax.validation API dependency to resolve missing classes during migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 moves to Jakarta EE 10 (jakarta.validation), but legacy code or libraries might still reference javax.validation; adding this ensures compilation if mixed usage exists or specific legacy validation annotations are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add WireMock dependency for testing external service interactions.
Add Playwright dependency for browser automation testing.
Add Pitest mutation testing plugin configuration.
Add Surefire plugin configuration to fix test execution issues.
Configure Maven Jar plugin to set main class for executable JARs.
Add Jacoco plugin configuration for code coverage reporting and checking.
Add Frontend Maven plugin and Antrun plugin to integration and production profiles for building React frontend.
Add wiremock and integration Maven profiles to support different testing environments.
Update Node.js version in frontend-maven-plugin from v12 to v16.
Rename artifact ID from kitchensink to team03.
Add various properties for main class and package paths.
